div.h1: Softcut - dual-deck crossfaded overdub looper (4 voices)

p.em: two softcut voices per deck; Rev focuses one. Record-defines-loop

g.text: swap focused voice; Alt+Rev = save trimmed loop
re-align all voices (sync); Alt+Seq = save full, hold = erase voice

text.tspan: voice transport (red rec / green fwd / cyan rev); focused-voice hue idle; amber while saving

re-align all voices (sync); Alt+Seq = save full, hold = erase voice
